reasons: localized structured lineage route and global navigation
Public Content Envelope lineage dataset interface
reviewed relationship assertion semantics and uncertainty states

reproducibility.detail: The Slice 4 implementation has not yet completed Linux and Windows clean-checkout CI from an immutable commit.

static_correctness.detail: Web lint, TypeScript typecheck, production build and release-gate ownership and trust checks pass locally.

public_contracts.detail: The localized lineage route uses canonical URL state for focus, ancestor depth, descendant depth and selected relationship; invalid values normalize by permanent redirect; the legacy route redirects by request language while preserving task state.

media_and_content_truth.detail: Parents, children, ancestors, descendants and siblings are computed from reviewed parentage assertions rather than father_id or mother_id fields; assertion paths preserve confirmed, tentative, disputed and superseded semantics, source IDs and dependency-profile availability.
evidence: Bao Li tentative father journey: PASS

browser_journeys.detail: The complete 42-test browser suite covers graph-free structured relationships, URL normalization, relation selection, bilingual state preservation, native keyboard controls, no-JavaScript rendering, trusted profile continuation, existing Atlas/profile journeys and map behavior.

automated_accessibility.detail: Chinese and English structured lineage pages pass desktop and 320-pixel mobile axe WCAG A/AA scans, keyboard-native scope controls, no-horizontal-overflow checks and reduced-motion verification.
evidence: Chinese and English structured lineage desktop/mobile axe journeys: PASS

visual_regression.detail: No immutable Slice 4 Staging deployment and named semantic visual review are yet bound to this implementation.

performance_budgets.detail: The production build reports 107 kB First Load JS for the localized structured lineage route, below the structured public-route budget of 170 KiB.

staging.detail: An immutable Cloudflare Staging deployment, bundle checksum and Staging browser/accessibility results are not yet recorded for Slice 4.

human_signoff.detail: Named product-owner review of bilingual relationship wording, uncertainty states, source paths, mobile reflow and URL sharing is not yet recorded for Slice 4.

release_decision.detail: Local implementation evidence is complete, but clean-checkout CI, immutable Staging identity and named Slice 4 review remain incomplete. This manifest must not be interpreted as release GO.
